_notes: Seed set for ticket 004. Covers both LOTM1 and COI — retrieval spans both books, so both casts need pre-merged aliases to prevent NER fragmentation.
All entries have is_spoiler=0. Entity-level reveal gating is deferred to ticket 017; chunk-level reading-position filter is the only spoiler mechanism.

Pathway convention: one entity per pathway (22 total). Sequence 9 tier names (Seer, Spectator, Sailor, Mystery Pryer, Apprentice, Prisoner, Sleepless) are folded in as aliases of their parent pathway. The Sequence 0 tier title is always the pathway name itself (e.g., SEQ0 of White Tower Pathway is 'White Tower'); the deity currently or historically holding that position is recorded separately in meta.sequence_0_deity.
meta.book indicates primary appearance; 'both' = cross-book recurring. meta.pathway is an NER hint, not authoritative.

aliases: The Mysterious Ruler above the Gray Fog

meta.pathway_note: Started on Tyrant Pathway (SEQ9 Sailor tier). By end of Circle of Inevitability, switched to Hanged Man Pathway (SEQ2 Profane Presbyter). Tarot Club codename 'The Hanged Man' pre-existed the pathway switch and isn't derived from it.

meta.affiliation: Church of the Fool; Rose School of Thought Temperance Faction (former)
Church of the Fool; Eggers Family
meta.relation: Son of Salinger (the god Death, SEQ0 Death Pathway). Azik is NOT Death himself. External Beyonder orgs mistakenly believed him to be Tarot Club 'The Death' — seed does not treat 'Death' as an Azik alias.

meta.red_priest_uniqueness_note: Fused the Red Priest Pathway Uniqueness (via the River of Eternal Darkness distributary) into a brand-new Great Old One path — became a Half Great Old One; madness from the fusion contributed to his Pale Era defeat. Not a second SEQ0 on Red Priest — framing should be 'absorbed Red Priest Uniqueness into Half Great Old One path'.
meta.status: deceased (Pale Era; killed by Seven Orthodox Gods)
meta.affiliation: Eggers Family; Balam Empire (founder); Rose Redemption (former)
meta.relation: Father of Azik Eggers. Left part of his soul in Azik for future resurrection.
meta.note: 'Death' as a deity name in the narrative refers to Salinger, not Azik and not the pathway. Disambiguate against 'Death Pathway' (entity_type=pathway) at NER time.

meta.affiliation: Church of the Fool; Life School of Thought
Nighthawks
Nighthawks
Nighthawks

meta.uniqueness_note: Born a SEQ1 Worm of Time with the Error Uniqueness; later accommodated the Door Uniqueness and a Key of Stars Beyonder characteristic, ascending to Dual-Pathway True God.
meta.note: Mr. A is NOT Amon — see separate Mr. A entry

meta.affiliation: Aurora Order (one of 22 Oracles); worshipped the True Creator (Adam)
meta.death: June 1350. Killed by Klein's trap — forced observation of the mad Half-Fool Antigonus caused instant mental death; body mutated and fused with the historical projection Senor and Creeping Hunger into a gigantic mushroom. The proximate agent is Klein's trap, not Antigonus acting directly.
meta.note: Distinct from Amon. Sequence 5 Beyonder of Hanged Man / Secrets Suppliant Pathway.

aliases: King of Angels of the Fool Pathway
Founder of the Nation of the Evernight

meta.affiliation: Antigonus Family (deceased); Church of the Evernight Goddess; Tudor Empire (former); Solomon Empire (former); Nation of the Evernight (founder)
meta.note: Earned 'The Half-Fool' via a fate-manipulation ritual with Amon. Demoted from SEQ1 to SEQ2 by Klein upon Klein's acquisition of the Fool Uniqueness. His mad state is the 'mythical projection' that killed Mr. A in Klein's Foggy Town trap. Descended from Demonic Wolf Flegrea bloodline. The Antigonus Family's Notebook drives major LOTM1 plot arcs.

meta.affiliation: Church of the Evernight Goddess (former); allied with Mr. A, Panatiya, Sauron-Einhorn-Medici
meta.equipment: Sealed Artifact 0-08 (Quill of Alzuhod); umbilical cord from True Creator's Spawn
meta.note: Blind in one eye. Fugitive from Evernight after his archbishop era.

Divinity Side / Eldest Son of the Ancient Sun God (whose true name was 'Grisha Adam'). 'Grisha' and 'Grisha Adam' are recorded as aliases of the Ancient Sun God entity, not Adam, even though Adam inherits the surname narratively — this split prevents NER fragmentation between pre-death (Ancient Sun God) and post-resurrection (Adam / True Creator) references. 'In Modern Day' side-story identity is Peng Deng (distinct from Zhang Yujia, which is the Ancient Sun God's modern-day identity).
Ancestor of the Medici Family — NOT the same as Albus Medici (his descendant); see separate entry

meta.affiliation: Medici Family; Iron and Blood Cross Order
meta.note: Descendant of the original Medici (Red Angel). Distinct character; translation-time ambiguity with ancestor is the whole reason this seed pre-separates them.

aliases: First Consul of the Intis Republic

meta.note: Modern-day identity Huang Tao is distinct from Zhou Mingrui — both are transmigrators, Huang Tao is Zhou Mingrui's superior at Intis Group

meta.affiliation: Haoli Lineage; Church of the Eternal Darkness; one of the Seven Orthodox Gods
meta.note: Formed from the eye of the Original Creator. Controls SEQ0 Darkness + multiple SEQ1 authorities across Darkness, Death, Twilight Giant. Divine Kingdom: Tenebrous Heaven. Sealed Antigonus in Foggy Town.

meta.affiliation: Church of the Lord of Storms; one of the Seven Orthodox Gods
meta.note: Former Wind Angel under the Ancient Sun God (Third Epoch). Patron of sailors and Loen Kingdom. Died striking the Mother Goddess of Depravity.

meta.status: deceased (Summer 1360; died willingly to Lumian Lee to become a symbolic weapon against the Mother Goddess of Depravity)
meta.note: One of the eight Ancient Gods (Second Epoch). Sanguines' ancestor and god. Faked her death and took on the identity/destiny of Omebella (the original Earth Mother), ascending to Mother SEQ0 and becoming the deity of the Church of the Earth Mother. Symbol: bat wings over a crimson moon.

meta.affiliation: Church of the Eternal Blazing Sun; one of the Seven Orthodox Gods
meta.note: Formerly one of eight Kings of Angels under the Ancient Sun God (Third Epoch). Distinct from the Ancient Sun God — became SEQ0 Sun after the Ancient Sun God's downfall.

meta.status: deceased (1352, killed in 1350 World War by Evernight Goddess and Lilith-as-Earth-Mother)
meta.affiliation: Church of the God of Combat; Rose Redemption (former); one of the Seven Orthodox Gods
meta.note: Second Epoch God of Dawn (subsidiary to Giant King Aurmir); Third Epoch apotheosis to SEQ0 Twilight Giant; Fourth Epoch established Church; Fifth Epoch killed 1352.

meta.affiliation: Church of the God of Knowledge and Wisdom; one of the Seven Orthodox Gods
Church of the God of Steam and Machinery; one of the Seven Orthodox Gods
meta.note: Changed title from 'God of Craftsmanship' to 'God of Steam and Machinery' in the Fifth Epoch following Roselle Gustav's Industrial Revolution.

meta.status: deceased; exists as personality inside Lumian Lee's dream (mayor of his dream city)
meta.affiliation: Demoness Sect (principal deity)
meta.note: Joined Salinger in the Pale Era. Honorific: 'The Female Body of the Primordial God Almighty'.

meta.uniqueness_note: Held Darkness Uniqueness + 3 SEQ1 characteristics; Fool Uniqueness + 1 SEQ1 characteristic
meta.status: deceased (Second Epoch, Early Era of Fire; conspiracy of Sanguine Ancestor Lilith and Mutated King Kvastir)
meta.affiliation: Demonic Wolves; Ancient Gods
meta.origin: Forsaken Land of the Gods (Eastern Continent)
meta.note: Antigonus descends from Flegrea's bloodline — relevant to Fool Pathway origin lore.

meta.affiliation: Machinery Hivemind
Rose School of Thought

meta.affiliation: Pope of the Sick Church

meta.tarot_club: Four of Swords (Minor, formerly under Justice, currently under The Chariot)
meta.affiliation: Church of the Ruler of Calamity (Pope); Sick Church (Acting Pope); Tarot Club; Psychology Alchemists
Church of the God of Knowledge and Wisdom (sealed there, nominally); Primordial Hunger (former)
meta.note: Sealed Angel of the Tail-Devourer Pathway under the Primordial Hunger, presenting as a ~7–8-year-old boy. Godson of Lumian Lee, Franca Roland, and Jenna (formerly of Baron Brignais).

meta.status: deceased (Fall 1352; gave up His life and apotheosis ritual to Amon, who thereby promoted to Error SEQ0)
meta.affiliation: Abraham Family (ancestor); Tudor Empire; Solomon Empire (former)
meta.note: King of Angels of the Door Pathway; held Door Uniqueness + all three SEQ1 Key of Stars Beyonder Characteristics but used Door Pathway sealing to avoid qualitative change to SEQ0. Corrupted by Mother Goddess of Depravity; banished by Evernight Goddess + Lord of Storms in the War of the Four Emperors. 'Mr. Door' is the public designation in lieu of His real name; 'Yagates' is His dream-symbol in The Fool's Dream.

meta.affiliation: Element Dawn (founder); Emerald City; Intis Republic (former princess); Pirate Kings
meta.relation: Eldest daughter of Roselle Gustav; master of Cattleya
meta.note: Pirate King known as 'Queen Mystic'; ship is 'The Dawn'. Hermit Pathway SEQ2 Sage. Became holder of the Black Emperor's Crown (Black Emperor Pathway Uniqueness) following Roselle's Project Vortex sacrifice.

meta.status: deceased (Year 0 Fourth Epoch at the Feast of Betrayal); Evil Spirit remnant defeated Fall 1352 by Klein Moretti, Colin Iliad, Derrick Berg, and Lovia Tiffany
meta.affiliation: Rose Redemption (co-founder); Ancient Sun God's Kings of Angels (leader, former)
meta.note: Leader of the eight Kings of Angels under the Ancient Sun God; first Angel the Ancient Sun God created, from part of His personality + Authority of Degeneration + Hanged Man characteristics + one of His ribs, in order to wield the Chaos Sea and separate Himself from the Primordial God Almighty's corruption. Co-founded Rose Redemption with the Evernight Goddess to kill the Ancient Sun God. After the Feast of Betrayal, His consciousness merged into the Ancient Sun God's resurrected body as the True Creator; residual psyche / will / aura + Chaos Sea power became an Evil Spirit. Distinct entity from Ancient Sun God, Adam, and True Creator.

meta.status: deceased (Year 0 Fourth Epoch; besieged at the Feast of Betrayal by Rose Redemption). Resurrected as Adam (Divinity Side) and True Creator (Humanity Side).
meta.affiliation: Forsaken Land of the Gods
meta.note: Third Epoch's supreme deity. True name per wiki is 'Grisha Adam' — recorded here rather than under Adam to keep pre-death references disambiguated. Father of Amon (Youngest Son) and Adam (Eldest Son / Divinity Side). Created Sasrir (Negative Side) with part of His personality + one rib + Hanged Man characteristics. After His death, consciousness resurrected in His own corpse (merged with Sasrir's consciousness) as the True Creator; separately, the Eldest Son's Divinity Side is Adam. 'Zhang Yujia' is the Ancient Sun God's 'In Modern Day' side-story identity (distinct from Adam's 'Peng Deng'). Must be kept distinct at NER time from (a) the current SEQ0 Sun deity Eternal Blazing Sun / Aucuses, who took the Sun SEQ0 seat only after the Ancient Sun God's downfall, (b) Adam, and (c) the Sasrir entity.

meta.affiliation: Church of the Fool (Oracle of the Sea God); Resistance; Golden Dream Pirates (former, Fourth Boatswain); Church of the Lord of Storms (former)
meta.relation: Former subordinate of Edwina Edwards on the Golden Dream
meta.note: Red Priest Pathway SEQ4 Iron-blooded Knight in COI (was SEQ6 Conspirer in LOTM1). Code name at Golden Dream Pirates: 'Blazing' (烈焰).

meta.affiliation: Church of the God of Knowledge and Wisdom (Archbishop; Saint); Golden Dream Pirates (former captain)
meta.relation: Descendant of Edwards (a follower of Roselle Gustav, confirmed via Bernadette Gustav); former master of Danitz Dubois
meta.note: One of the seven Pirate Admirals in LOTM1 (captain of the Golden Dream). Advanced from SEQ5 Mysticism Magister to SEQ4 Prophet by COI.

aliases: The Real Mutated King of Mushrooms

meta.affiliation: The Future (first mate under Cattleya); Church of the Earth Mother (former orphan cloister)
meta.note: Mother Pathway SEQ5 Druid. Cross-breeding fanatic; developed the dark-growing mushrooms that sustain the Forsaken Land of the Gods.

meta.status: deceased twice — LOTM1 Ch1353 via Law of Beyonder Characteristics Convergence; COI Ch1135 parasitised by Amon
meta.affiliation: Celestial Worthy of Heaven and Earth for Blessings (attendant); Secret Order (former leader)
meta.relation: Descendant of Zaratul Senior (killed by Bethel Abraham + Half-Fool Antigonus in the War of the Four Emperors)
meta.note: Klein Moretti's rival Fool-Pathway Miracle Invoker (SEQ2). Distinct from Zaratul Senior.

Fourth/Fifth Epoch faction. Not the same as Hermit Pathway.

meta.parent: Church of the God of Steam and Machinery

meta.note: Tudor Empire aristocratic angel family that controlled the Fool Pathway. Eliminated by the Church of the Evernight Goddess during the Fourth Epoch. The Antigonus Family's Notebook is a major LOTM1 plot driver.
Albus Medici belongs to this family.
Azik Eggers is of this family.
Albus Medici is a member. Operates in the Trier region.

meta.status: destroyed after Primordial Demoness's death; remnants merged with Sick Church into Church of the Ruler of Calamity
meta.note: Fourth Epoch was 'Demoness Family'; later Demoness Sect.
Distinct from Demoness Sect. Remnants merged with Demoness Sect into Church of the Ruler of Calamity after the Primordial Demoness's death.
Divided into West Balam and East Balam after the War of the Four Emperors.
Seer is SEQ9 tier name; folded in as alias.
Formerly held by the Ancient Sun God (Third Epoch) before Aucuses took the SEQ0 seat.
Sailor is SEQ9 tier name; folded in as alias. Alger Wilson was on this pathway before switching to Hanged Man in COI.
Also called Secrets Suppliant. Mr. A was on this pathway (SEQ5). Alger Wilson switched to this pathway in COI.
Distinct from Visionary Pathway. Cattleya (Tarot Club 'The Hermit') is on this pathway.
Spectator is SEQ9 tier name. Adam and Audrey Hall are on this pathway.
Apprentice is SEQ9 tier name. Fors Wall is on this pathway. Amon accommodated the Door Uniqueness as secondary.
Sleepless is SEQ9 tier name. Leonard Mitchell, Dunn Smith, and Ince Zangwill (after switch) are on this pathway.
SEQ0 title is 'Death' (= pathway name). Salinger held this title. Azik Eggers is on this pathway at SEQ2 Death Consul; he is Salinger's son but is NOT Death.
Former SEQ0 Giant King Aurmir (Second Epoch). Ryan Vitia is on this pathway.
Franca Roland and Jenna are on this pathway. Lilith was formerly on this pathway before ascending to Mother SEQ0.

Lilith (held Moon SEQ0 in parallel with Mother SEQ0; deceased 1360)
meta.note: Emlyn White is on this pathway.
Prisoner is SEQ9 tier name. Reinette Tinekerr and Sharron are on this pathway.

meta.note: Bishop at Saint Samuel Cathedral, Backlund; interacts with Klein (as Dwayne Dantès) during the Aurora Order / Mr. X arc.
